subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Tree of Justice to her whom God hath chosen and associated with His own Self. Bear thou witness that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان هذا کتاب من شجره العدل الی التی اصطفاها الله و نسبها الی نفسه ان اشهدی انه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
